name: add-step
instruction: Add a new function `describe_top(products: List[Product], cat: String) -> String` that finds the most expensive product in a category and returns `"name: $price"` format. If no products in that category, return `"empty"`. Follow the same coding style as `top_in_category`. Use `int.to_string(p.price)` to convert the price. Keep all existing functions unchanged.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.filter(xs, (x) => bool)` filters elements. `list.sort_by(xs, (x) => key)` sorts ascending. `list.reverse(xs)` reverses. `list.first(xs)` returns `Option[A]`. `int.to_string(n)` converts Int to String. String interpolation: `"${expr}"`. `list.fold(xs, init, (acc, x) => val)` reduces.
